name: Super Retail Group Limited
analysis: SUL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 33% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$12.7900. Trade idea: entry A$12.8700, stop A$11.0088, target A$14.4720 (0.86:1) — then trail it.
